description: Rotating radar sweep over a city-level map. Targets appear as the sweep crosses them. Best for surveillance operations, signal intercept, missile defense coverage, intelligence monitoring.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline, e.g. 'SIGNALS INTELLIGENCE — NSA STATION' or 'RADAR COVERAGE MAP'
fields.MAP_LABEL_1: Radar station city key (uppercase): LOS_ANGELES, NEW_YORK, LONDON, DUBAI, TOKYO, WASHINGTON_DC, MOSCOW, TEHRAN, BEIJING, PYONGYANG
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Intel description, e.g. 'Station monitors communications across a 400km radius'
fields.LABEL_1: Label for stat 1, e.g. 'COVERAGE RADIUS' or 'MONITORING'
fields.LABEL_2: Label for stat 2, e.g. 'TARGETS DETECTED' or 'UPTIME'
